Legal boundary

No user data.
No investment advice.
No silent authority.

This public site is a static, public-safe proof institution. It does not want personal data, does not collect user accounts, does not provide professional advice, and does not authorize funds.

Read Data-Zero PrivacyRead Terms
Data-zero

We do not want user data.

No forms, no analytics, no cookies, no accounts, no database, no advertising pixels, no support chat, and no intentional personal-data collection. Users must not submit personal or confidential data.

Responsibility

Users control their choices.

Users and operators are responsible for wallets, keys, RPC providers, third-party services, data they provide, jurisdiction, taxes, securities, sanctions, privacy, procurement, and compliance.

Token boundary

No investment posture.

AGIALPHA references are protocol-utility and canonical-identity references only. AGIALPHA is a pre-existing public-market token at 0xA61a3B3a130a9c20768EEBF97E21515A6046a1fA. It is not available from MontrealAI or this website. Nothing here is an offer, sale, recommendation, profit promise, exchange service, broker-dealer service, custody service, market-making service, liquidity support, price support, or investment advice.

AGIALPHA token boundary

Not available from MontrealAI or this website.

Official Ethereum Mainnet checksum address: 0xA61a3B3a130a9c20768EEBF97E21515A6046a1fA. AGIALPHA is treated as a pre-existing public-market token. Any third-party market interaction is outside this site and solely the responsibility of the user/operator.

Read AGIALPHA Token Boundary

Public/private proof boundary

Publish proof. Keep private data out.

The project is designed around public commitments, manifests, hashes, evidence dockets, and review surfaces—not private prompts, customer data, wallet secrets, confidential traces, or regulated user information.

No data wanted
No forms
No cookies
No advice
No custody
No guarantees
User responsibility
Privacy

Data-Zero Privacy Policy

Clear statement that the site intentionally avoids collecting personal data.

Terms

Terms of Use

User/operator responsibilities, wallet risk, no warranties, no reliance, and indemnity language.

Regulatory

Regulatory Boundary

No legal, financial, investment, tax, compliance, or audit advice.

Third parties

Third-Party Responsibility

GitHub, wallets, RPC providers, Etherscan, IPFS, browsers, and Ethereum are independent surfaces.

Machine-readable policy

Legal boundary policy

The site publishes a machine-readable legal boundary policy for automated checks.
